prompt: Generate a vertical 9:16 high-definition realistic photography portrait, with the theme of a real-world World Cup soccer fan girl. The overall style is playful, youthful, and highly memorable. Close-up mobile phone perspective, low-angle slight upward shot, the upper body leans forward towards the lens, both hands holding a small soccer ball high above the head, arms, ball, and body forming a stable triangular composition with exaggerated and cute perspective. Head slightly tilted up looking down at the camera, chin slightly raised, bright smile, relaxed and eye-catching atmosphere. Adult young Japanese female, lively and sweet features, realistic and delicate skin, preserving natural skin texture. Slender and well-proportioned body, clear neck and shoulders, natural collarbone. Hairstyle is high twin ponytails, decorated with soccer bows, colorful beads, and small trophy earrings. Makeup is energetic, with small soccer and heart paintings on cheeks and fine glitter under the eyes. Wearing a blue, white, and red patchwork short fan top, paired with a high-waisted pleated mini skirt and a light transparent baseball jacket, clothing covered in soccer patterns, numbers, team slogans, trophies, and grass textures. Shoelaces, wristbands, and waist accessories all incorporate soccer elements. Background is a real World Cup outdoor viewing square or fan zone, including giant screens, flags, light boards, fences, and cheering crowds. The background is slightly blurred with vivid colors, having a viral spread feel.
